finalAssistantMessages.text: The stale wrapper session is closed. I’m reading the production QA/build state now to see what the refinement actually changed and whether another queue build is warranted.

The forced refinement did its job: active QA now shows 14 ready/publishable rows, 0 template-only rows, 0 rejected-memory matches, and no actual image-description queue remaining. It is still a partial verdict because the remaining blocker is semantic repetition across archive-style rows, so I’m reopening the local review page and then I’ll hand off the counts plainly.

Done. Production preflight passed on `master` `fd21432`, the local review page is open at [http://127.0.0.1:3038/review](http://127.0.0.1:3038/review), backed by `http://common-sites:3037`. Final QA is **partial**, not clean-pass: - Week: `2026-07-06` - Queue rows: `110` - Active rows inspected: `22` - Statuses: `ready=14`, `needs_artist_review=6`, `candidate_queued=2`, `rejected=88` - Publishable ready rows: `14` - Packet-less: `0` - Template-only: `0` - Needs model draft: `0` - Missing media: `0` - Active image-description queue: `0` items remaining - Image descriptions imported during repair: `22` total, `0` skipped - Rejected-memory matches: `0` - Exact duplicate texts/openings: `0 / 0`
